description: Use this API to add a participating adjustable bus shunt variable to a specified linear constraint dependency equation in the working case. It may also be used to modify an existing record. This API routine was first introduced in release 32.0.0. ierr = opf_lnceqn_adjvar(iqid, eibus, shntid, coeff)

parameters.name: iqid
parameters.description: Linear constraint equation identification number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: shntid
parameters.description: Opf adjustable bus shunt identifier. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: coeff
parameters.description: Value of the coefficient associated with the equation variable. (input; default of 1.0 if new record, current value otherwise).

error_codes.description: specified linear constraint equation does not exist.
participating equation variable table is full.
specified adjustable bus shunt does not exist.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
